title: W4 contracts: registry inventory + deterministic validator (src/contracts) + fixture matrices (C-01..C-03)

AC1.note: contract-inventory.md: all 34 *.schema.json + registry, verbatim $id/owner/persistence/migration policy (from schema-version-registry.json); zero gaps (verified: every schema file mentioned).

AC2.note: src/contracts deterministic validator covers full used-keyword set incl const/allOf/oneOf/if-then/uniqueItems/min-max Items/maxLength/format:date-time + cross-file & local $ref/$defs; keyword-coverage used(22) subset supported(24); no external lib (deps={}); T8 enforcement proof: every keyword rejects invalid input.

AC3.note: src/contracts/fixtures.test.ts: 6 matrices (positive/negative/keyword-coverage/mutation/migration/fixture-hash), 79 tests, deterministic; RED before C-02, GREEN after.

AC4.note: tsc --noEmit clean; full bun test 633 pass/0 fail (554 baseline + 79 new); package.json dependencies={} unchanged (no new prod dep).

AC5.note: frozen requirements pkg + ADR-0001..0004 untouched (git empty); new code only src/contracts/; new doc contract-inventory.md; src/harness/ reserved/empty. T8 review CLEAN.
